title: Marketing Content Polish — README, RedNote, Reddit

success_looks_like: README.md is publication-ready with correct URLs and world-class copy
6 RedNote posts ready to copy-paste with natural Chinese tone
3 Reddit posts ready to copy-paste with authentic developer voice
failure_looks_like: Content reads as machine-translated or AI-generated marketing copy
Posts reference outdated features or wrong URLs
README is generic and doesn't differentiate from competitors
dod.quality_bar: Content should be immediately publishable without editing

output.summary: Read vision, registry, lessons, prior marketing outputs.
GitHub remote still agent-conductor. npm gru-ai v0.2.1. demo.gif exists. Prior content drafts substantial.
Single project: content-polish-for-launch. Taylor builds, Priya reviews.
No worktree needed — content files only, working on main branch.

2 of 3 tasks completed. RedNote (6 posts) and Reddit (3 posts) finalized and ready to publish. README rewrite deferred to new directive — CEO rejected initial polish, wants complete rewrite with screenshots, pipeline explanation, harness engineering references, and CEO experience narrative.
RedNote and Reddit tasks reviewed by Priya. README task deferred — no review needed. 2/3 tasks passed review.

Directive partially completed. Follow-up: new directive for README rewrite with expanded scope. Deliverables: rednote-posts-final.md (6 posts), reddit-posts-final.md (3 posts). Screenshots captured to docs/assets/.
CEO approved completion. 2/3 deliverables done. README deferred to dedicated directive with fuller scope.
